name: My doctor says my cancer might be from years of paint fumes at work—now what?

mainEntity.name: My doctor says my cancer might be from years of paint fumes at work—now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Prove job link via experts, file occupational claim.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: **File workers' comp for occupational disease, proving substantial job causation.** Latent effects qualify if linked.[9][1] Timeline: exposure history, medical nexus. Get specialist eval, notify employer. Long-term claims succeed with documentation.

description: Prove job link via experts, file occupational claim.[9]
